CustomField.description: Total Broker Commission paid for by Seller. For optional program use only. This field is not linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub and not required when entering a resale. Previous help text instructed users to subtract this amount from Line 502 when entering Seller's Closing Costs, but as of version 1.10, Seller's Closing Costs should be taken directly from Line 502. If you were subtracting Broker Commission prior to v1.10, please update the values in Seller's Closing Costs to include Broker Commission. Also, if any BC amounts were listed as reductions OTHER than Line 502 (Seller's Closing Costs), they need to be moved into the new field "Other Reductions to Amount Due Seller" in order to make the new check "Gross Amount Due to Seller Accounted For" work. Contact HomeKeeper staff with any questions.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total Broker Commission paid for by Seller. For optional program use only. This field is not linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub and not required when entering a resale.
CustomField.label: Broker Commission
